_doc: Raven Hollow titles registry. Consumed by TitleSystem (scripts/systems/title_system.gd). A title is the second name you earned (design/PVP_RANKS_TITLES.md 10). pos = 'prefix' ('Fog-Sergeant Kriggar') or 'suffix' ('Kriggar, the Untithed'). cat groups them in the picker. hidden = not shown in the sheet until earned (survivor/conduct surprises). Titles are permanent once earned. The rank_NN titles are granted by PvPSystem.rank_changed; achievement-reward titles resolve by display name from data/achievements.json reward.title; faction_exalted maps a faction id to the suffix title granted at Exalted.

rank_01.name: Lamplighter
rank_01.desc: Accord Roll rank 1. Keeps one lamp lit on one road.

rank_02.name: Well-Warden
rank_02.desc: Accord Roll rank 2. Checks the wells for copper, and tastes them.

rank_03.name: Fog-Sergeant
rank_03.desc: Accord Roll rank 3. Leads a file of lamps through the interior seams.

rank_04.name: Stone-Sergeant
rank_04.desc: Accord Roll rank 4. Patrols the standing stones and has never read one.

rank_05.name: Vigil-Blade
rank_05.desc: Accord Roll rank 5. First rank permitted to draw on Accord business.

rank_06.name: Blade-Lieutenant
rank_06.desc: Accord Roll rank 6. Commands a crossing two banners pretend not to watch.

rank_07.name: Blade-Captain
rank_07.desc: Accord Roll rank 7. Holds a border fort's roll and its tempers.

rank_08.name: Veil-Champion
rank_08.desc: Accord Roll rank 8. Duels for the Vigil's honor when a grievance is filed.

rank_09.name: Lieutenant of the Accord
rank_09.desc: Accord Roll rank 9. Carries sealed words between capitals; reads none of them.

rank_10.name: Commander of the Accord
rank_10.desc: Accord Roll rank 10. Commands all the lamps of one kingdom's roads.

rank_11.name: Marshal of the Four Roads
rank_11.desc: Accord Roll rank 11. The four capital roads answer to one rider.

rank_12.name: Field Marshal of the Veil
rank_12.desc: Accord Roll rank 12. Holds the fog-line itself in the Long Vigil's name.

rank_13.name: High Marshal of the Long Vigil
rank_13.desc: Accord Roll rank 13. Second lamp of the continent. Signs the Roll.

rank_14.name: Warden of the Pause
rank_14.desc: Accord Roll rank 14. Keeps the lamp no one may see out. One per season.

the_untithed.name: the Untithed
the_untithed.desc: Finished a season in the top 0.5% of the Accord Roll. The Floor never took a drop.

of_the_red_sand.name: of the Red Sand
of_the_red_sand.desc: Finished a season in the top 3%.

pit_proven.name: Pit-Proven
pit_proven.desc: Finished a season in the top 10%.

bloodletter.name: Bloodletter
bloodletter.desc: Won 100 rated duels on the Reckoning Floor.

ledger_long.name: Ledger-Long
ledger_long.desc: Fought 1,000 duels, win or lose. The Clerk respects attendance.

flawless.name: the Flawless
flawless.desc: Won a match two rounds to none without dropping below 90% health.

pit_breaker.name: Pit-Breaker
pit_breaker.desc: Cleared The Killing Floors. Valrom is down.

spirewalker.name: Spirewalker
spirewalker.desc: Cleared The Black Spire. Cazimir found.

the_bookmark.name: the Bookmark
the_bookmark.desc: Finished The Grave and the Bloodstone Pit. You held the Pause.

of_the_long_vigil.name: of the Long Vigil
of_the_long_vigil.desc: Cleared all three raids on one character.

first_lamp.name: First Lamp
first_lamp.desc: First clear of a raid within its content season. The one-hearth server-first.

keeper_of_kept_names.name: Keeper of Kept Names
keeper_of_kept_names.desc: Finished the capstone of The Kept Names.

the_ward.name: the Ward
the_ward.desc: Finished the capstone of Ward's Week.

emberkept.name: Emberkept
emberkept.desc: Finished the capstone of The Emberfall Vigil.

the_proofed.name: the Proofed
the_proofed.desc: Finished the capstone of The Proofing.

of_the_gift.name: of the Gift
of_the_gift.desc: Finished The Gift-Tide. Wear it knowing what the Gift is made of.

thin_walker.name: Thin-Walker
thin_walker.desc: Finished the capstone of The Thinning.

stranger_fed.name: Stranger-Fed
stranger_fed.desc: Sat at The Table of Strangers.

count_keeper.name: Count-Keeper
count_keeper.desc: Present at the Turning of the Count bell.

still_walking.name: Still Walking
still_walking.desc: Survived a Hungering pull of 4+ stacks at 5% health. Already collected. Why is it still walking.

copper_blooded.name: Copper-Blooded
copper_blooded.desc: Let Copper-Sickness expire naturally three times. Never bought the cure.

the_untreated.name: the Untreated
the_untreated.desc: Let Infected run its full course five times.

mange_proof.name: Mange-Proof
mange_proof.desc: Killed a dog-swarm pull while at five stacks of Mange.

the_incurious.name: the Incurious
the_incurious.desc: Finished Act I without reading a single inscription stone. Old Marta's own discipline.

exalted_angelwings.name: of the Angel Wings
exalted_angelwings.desc: Stand Exalted with the Angel Wings.

exalted_strigoi.name: of Blestem
exalted_strigoi.desc: Stand Exalted with the Strigoi of Blestem.

exalted_varcolaci.name: of Sangeroasa
exalted_varcolaci.desc: Stand Exalted with the Varcolaci of Sangeroasa.

exalted_iele.name: of the Black Night
exalted_iele.desc: Stand Exalted with the Iele of the Black Night.
